title: hieracium jurassicum subsp. lancifrons
intro: Hieracium jurassicum subsp. lancifrons, also known as the lancet-leaved hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its bright yellow flowers and jagged leaves. The plant is used in traditional herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Hieracium jurassicum subsp. lancifrons include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
